title.en: NGV Preamble & Midambles: L-STF Through NGV-LTF, NGV-SIG and RNGV-SIG
title.zh: NGV 前导与中导：从 L-STF 到 NGV-LTF、NGV-SIG 与 RNGV-SIG

blocks.en: When a car talks to another car over 802.11 NGV (Next Generation V2X), the packet has to do two jobs at once. It must be understood by ordinary roadside legacy radios that have never heard of NGV, and it must still carry the new high-mobility features NGV adds. The NGV preamble solves this by stacking two layers: first a block of non-NGV (legacy-compatible) training and signalling fields, then a block of NGV-specific fields. A legacy Clause 17 receiver reads the first block and at least recognises the packet's presence and length; an NGV receiver reads both.
blocks.zh: 当一辆车通过 802.11 NGV（下一代车联网）与另一辆车通信时，这个数据包必须同时完成两件事。它既要能被那些从未听说过 NGV 的普通路侧传统电台所理解，又要承载 NGV 新增的高速移动特性。NGV 前导通过叠加两层来解决这个问题：先是一段非 NGV（向后兼容）的训练与信令字段，随后是一段 NGV 专用字段。一台传统的 Clause 17 接收机读取前一段，至少能识别出数据包的存在与长度；而 NGV 接收机则两段都读。

blocks.en: Read left to right, the preamble is: L-STF, L-LTF, L-SIG, RL-SIG, NGV-SIG, RNGV-SIG, NGV-STF, NGV-LTF, then Data. The 'L' fields are legacy: L-STF lets a receiver detect the packet and set its gain, L-LTF lets it lock onto frequency and do a first channel estimate, and L-SIG carries a rate and length so even a legacy radio knows how long to stay quiet. Everything after L-SIG is where NGV starts adding its own machinery.
blocks.zh: 从左到右读，前导依次为：L-STF、L-LTF、L-SIG、RL-SIG、NGV-SIG、RNGV-SIG、NGV-STF、NGV-LTF，然后才是 Data（数据）。以 “L” 开头的字段是传统字段：L-STF 让接收机检测到数据包并设置增益，L-LTF 让它锁定频率并做首次信道估计，L-SIG 携带速率与长度，这样即便是传统电台也知道该保持安静多久。L-SIG 之后的一切，就是 NGV 开始加入自己机制的地方。

caption.en: The NGV preamble: legacy fields first (solid), then NGV-specific fields (dashed), with midambles later spliced into the Data field.
caption.zh: NGV 前导：先是传统字段（实线），再是 NGV 专用字段（虚线），中导（midamble）随后被插入到数据字段之中。

blocks.en: Two ideas repeat through these fields. The first is cyclic shift: when a transmitter sends correlated copies of the same waveform on several antennas, they can accidentally beamform into nulls. NGV applies a small per-chain time shift to the legacy-modulated fields (L-STF through RNGV-SIG) and a per-stream shift to the NGV-modulated fields (NGV-STF, NGV-LTF, Data) so the antennas never line up into an unintended beam. The second is repetition: RL-SIG is a verbatim repeat of L-SIG, and RNGV-SIG is a verbatim repeat of NGV-SIG.
blocks.zh: 贯穿这些字段的有两个核心思想。第一个是循环移位（cyclic shift）：当发射机在多根天线上发送同一波形的相关副本时，它们可能意外地把波束成形成零点。NGV 对传统调制字段（L-STF 到 RNGV-SIG）施加每条发射链一个小的时间移位，对 NGV 调制字段（NGV-STF、NGV-LTF、Data）施加每条空间流一个移位，使天线永远不会对齐成非预期的波束。第二个是重复（repetition）：RL-SIG 是 L-SIG 的逐位重复，RNGV-SIG 是 NGV-SIG 的逐位重复。

blocks.en: Why repeat RL-SIG? It does double duty. Repeating L-SIG and then placing the NGV signalling right after it is the signature that lets an NGV receiver tell an NGV packet apart from an ordinary legacy packet — a legacy radio never repeats its L-SIG. The repeat also gives the receiver two copies of the same bits to combine, which is exactly what you want when the channel is fading as the car moves.
blocks.zh: 为什么要重复出 RL-SIG？它身兼两职。重复 L-SIG、并紧随其后放置 NGV 信令，正是让 NGV 接收机得以把 NGV 数据包与普通传统数据包区分开来的标志——传统电台从不重复它的 L-SIG。这次重复还给了接收机两份相同比特可供合并，而当车辆移动、信道发生衰落时，这恰恰是你想要的。

blocks.en: NGV-SIG is the brain of the NGV preamble: a single OFDM symbol carrying 24 bits that tell the receiver how to decode everything that follows. Among those 24 bits are the PHY version, the bandwidth (10 or 20 MHz), the NGV-MCS, whether one or two spatial streams are used, the LTF format, and — crucially for high mobility — the Midamble Periodicity (every 4, 8, or 16 symbols). Because losing NGV-SIG means losing the whole packet, it is sent twice as the NGV-SIG / RNGV-SIG pair, BPSK-modulated and rate-1/2 coded for robustness.
blocks.zh: NGV-SIG 是 NGV 前导的大脑：一个携带 24 比特的 OFDM 符号，告诉接收机如何解码其后的所有内容。这 24 比特中包括 PHY 版本、带宽（10 或 20 MHz）、NGV-MCS、使用一条还是两条空间流、LTF 格式，以及——对高速移动至关重要的——中导周期（每 4、8 或 16 个符号一次）。由于丢失 NGV-SIG 就意味着丢失整个数据包，它以 NGV-SIG / RNGV-SIG 成对的方式发送两次，并采用 BPSK 调制和 1/2 码率以增强稳健性。

blocks.en: After the signalling come the NGV training fields. NGV-STF (8 µs) refines automatic gain control for the MIMO transmission. NGV-LTF then lets the receiver estimate the actual MIMO channel — one, two, or four symbols depending on the number of spatial streams. It comes in three flavours: NGV-LTF-2x (the default), NGV-LTF-1x (compact, for a single high-efficiency stream), and NGV-LTF-2x-Repeat (for extended range). And this is exactly the training that gets reused mid-packet: a midamble is essentially an NGV-LTF dropped back into the Data field every few symbols.
blocks.zh: 信令之后是 NGV 训练字段。NGV-STF（8 微秒）为 MIMO 传输细化自动增益控制。随后 NGV-LTF 让接收机估计真实的 MIMO 信道——根据空间流数目，可为一个、两个或四个符号。它有三种形式：NGV-LTF-2x（默认）、NGV-LTF-1x（紧凑，用于单条高效流）和 NGV-LTF-2x-Repeat（用于扩展距离）。而这正是会在数据包中途被复用的那段训练：一个中导（midamble）本质上就是每隔几个符号被重新插回数据字段的一个 NGV-LTF。

blocks.en: That last point is the whole reason the NGV preamble is built this way. A preamble is measured once, at the very start of the packet. But a car at highway speed can move enough within a single frame that the channel it measured at the front no longer matches the channel at the back — the Doppler shift drifts the phase out from under the receiver. By spending bits in NGV-SIG to advertise a Midamble Periodicity, and by reusing the NGV-LTF structure as those midambles, the receiver gets fresh channel estimates spliced in throughout the Data field and can re-track a channel that is changing within one packet.
blocks.zh: 最后这一点正是 NGV 前导如此构造的全部原因。前导只在数据包最开始测量一次。但一辆高速公路上的车，在单个帧的时间内就可能移动到足够远，使它在帧首测得的信道已不再匹配帧尾的信道——多普勒频移把相位从接收机脚下漂移开了。通过在 NGV-SIG 中花费比特来通告中导周期，并复用 NGV-LTF 结构作为这些中导，接收机就能在整个数据字段中获得插入其间的新鲜信道估计，从而对在一个数据包内不断变化的信道进行重新跟踪。

summary.en: Cyclic shift split, the 24-bit NGV-SIG table, and the three NGV-LTF formats
summary.zh: 循环移位的划分、24 比特的 NGV-SIG 字段表，以及三种 NGV-LTF 格式

blocks.en: The standard splits cyclic shift in two (32.3.8.2): per-transmit-chain values from Table 21-10 apply to the pre-NGV-modulated fields (L-STF, L-LTF, L-SIG, RL-SIG, NGV-SIG, RNGV-SIG), while per-spatial-stream values from Table 21-11 apply to the NGV-modulated fields (NGV-STF, NGV-LTF, Data). The L-SIG RATE field is fixed to the 3 Mb/s value (32.3.8.5), and RL-SIG repeats it with the next pilot value to mark the packet as NGV (32.3.8.6). NGV-SIG (32.3.8.7) is one OFDM symbol of 24 bits per Table 32-10: B0-B1 PHY Version, B2 Bandwidth, B3-B6 NGV-MCS, B7 NSS, B8-B9 Midamble Periodicity (0=4, 1=8, 2=16 symbols; 3 reserved), B10 LTF Format, B11 LDPC Extra Symbol, B12 LTF Repetition, B13 reserved, B14-B17 CRC, B18-B23 Tail — BCC rate-1/2, interleaved, BPSK. RNGV-SIG (32.3.8.8) repeats it identically. NGV-STF (32.3.8.9) is 8 µs and reuses the VHT-STF sequence (20 MHz seq for 10 MHz tx; 40 MHz seq with per-10-MHz phase rotation for 20 MHz tx). NGV-LTF (32.3.8.10) supports NGV-LTF-1x, NGV-LTF-2x (default), and NGV-LTF-2x-Repeat; the number of symbols (1, 2, or 4) depends on NSS per Table 32-11 and on LTF_REP; pilot tones are multiplied by R-NGV-LTF rather than P-NGV-LTF so the receiver can track phase/frequency offset during channel estimation.
blocks.zh: 标准将循环移位一分为二（32.3.8.2）：来自 Table 21-10 的每发射链取值适用于 NGV 调制之前的字段（L-STF、L-LTF、L-SIG、RL-SIG、NGV-SIG、RNGV-SIG），而来自 Table 21-11 的每空间流取值适用于 NGV 调制字段（NGV-STF、NGV-LTF、Data）。L-SIG 的 RATE 字段固定为 3 Mb/s 对应值（32.3.8.5），RL-SIG 用下一个导频值重复它，以将该包标记为 NGV（32.3.8.6）。NGV-SIG（32.3.8.7）依 Table 32-10 是一个携带 24 比特的 OFDM 符号：B0-B1 为 PHY 版本，B2 为带宽，B3-B6 为 NGV-MCS，B7 为空间流数，B8-B9 为中导周期（0=4、1=8、2=16 个符号；3 保留），B10 为 LTF 格式，B11 为 LDPC 额外符号，B12 为 LTF 重复，B13 保留，B14-B17 为 CRC，B18-B23 为尾比特——BCC 1/2 码率、交织、BPSK。RNGV-SIG（32.3.8.8）对其做完全相同的重复。NGV-STF（32.3.8.9）为 8 微秒，复用 VHT-STF 序列（10 MHz 发射用 20 MHz 序列；20 MHz 发射用 40 MHz 序列并按每 10 MHz 子信道做相位旋转）。NGV-LTF（32.3.8.10）支持 NGV-LTF-1x、NGV-LTF-2x（默认）和 NGV-LTF-2x-Repeat；符号数目（1、2 或 4）依 Table 32-11 由空间流数及 LTF_REP 决定；导频音被乘以 R-NGV-LTF 矩阵而非 P-NGV-LTF，使接收机能在信道估计期间跟踪相位/频率偏移。
